instruction: Three things wrong with the bold icon: the base outline is green, the yellow star stamp is purple (wrong color), AND the yellow star stamp has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bold.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #22c55e" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M6 4h8a4 4 0 0 1 4 4 4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6z"/><path d="M6 12h9a4 4 0 0 1 4 4 4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6z"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#a855f7" points="20,24 22,30 28,30 23,34 25,40 20,36 15,40 17,34 12,30 18,30" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bold.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M6 4h8a4 4 0 0 1 4 4 4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6z"/><path d="M6 12h9a4 4 0 0 1 4 4 4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6z"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#fde047" points="20,16 22,22 28,22 23,26 25,32 20,28 15,32 17,26 12,22 18,22" />
</svg>
